title.en: At this moment, everyone quickly came to the Gr...

content.en:
What happened in the outside world like the gray mist stone, Ye Tian and the others were not very clear.

At this moment, everyone quickly came to the Gray Mist Bridge.

Some of the half-step Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land had indeed heard of the Grey Mist Stone Statue, but they had never entered

After all, there are only a hundred places for the Gray Mist Stone Statue every time it is born, and the number of places is too small, and when you know the news, you won't be able to catch up.

There are only those Legendary Realm Lords who have spent too many years and experienced many scenes of the birth of gray mist stone statues, and they must have been there.

At this time, many Legendary Realm Lords were quite excited, because the Gray Mist Stone Statue was also an incomparably huge opportunity for them, and if they were lucky, it would be enough to make a huge change in their fate.

Whoa!!

A legendary realm lord rushed into the bridge, they were not afraid of danger, and basically dared to come here The legendary realm lord sent them were clones, even if they fell, they only lost a clone.

Of course, they also held up all kinds of defenses, after all, once they fell, it was equivalent to missing the opportunity here.

However.

Soon, these Legendary Realm Lords returned to the entrance of the bridge one by one.

Suddenly, they were dumbfounded.

At this time, the frostless lord spoke: "This bridge is called the Gray Mist Bridge, it is not something that can be crossed by luck, according to rumors, if you want to pass through the Gray Mist Bridge, you must start from the innate eternal rules, if you can comprehend the eternal path on the Gray Mist Bridge, it will be even better." However, the Gray Mist Eternal Dao is very difficult to comprehend, and if you don't have enough talent, you can't comprehend it at all. If you cross the Grey Mist Bridge, you can get a reward, but I don't know what the reward is. "

"I see, thank you Lord Frostless!

One by one, the Legendary Realm Lords thanked.

Whoa!!

The half-step Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land rushed towards the Gray Mist Trick Bridge one by one, and they didn't come out for a long time, it was obvious that the strength of the half-step Legendary Realm was still strong enough, and their mastery of the innate eternal rules was far beyond these Realm Legendary Lords and Transcendent Realm Legendary Lords.

Therefore, the Gray Mist Bridge couldn't stop these half-step Legendary Realm Lords at all.

In fact, the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords are basically able to cross the Grey Mist Bridge, but the Realm Legendary Lords need a certain amount of time to comprehend before they can pass through the Grey Mist Bridge.

As for the Ice Han Lord and the Holy Peak Lord, it was actually impossible to break through the Gray Mist Bridge at all, so the Dragon Gu Lord said that it was a waste to give them two places, but this was Ye Tian's promise.

Moreover, it is also beneficial for the Ice Han Lord and the Holy Peak Lord to stay here all the time, which is enough to comprehend something, which will be of great help to their strength.

Ye Tian didn't care about the other progress, he was still silently contemplating on the Gray Mist Bridge.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of eternal years have passed.

this day.

'Hahaha!!'!"

Laughing inwardly, he finally realized the Eternal Dao of Gray Mist.

I have to say that this Eternal Dao is indeed very difficult, if it weren't for the legendary ancestral endowment with various attributes, coupled with the special environment here, otherwise he would really not be able to comprehend the Gray Mist Eternal Dao.

After the Gray Mist Eternal Dao involved too many innate eternal rules, and its power and potential were many times that of other Eternal Dao, it could be used as Ye Tian's main cultivation Eternal Dao in the future

Not only has the cultivation of the Gray Mist Eternal Dao been introduced, but the Mixed Yuan Eternal Dao and the Ten Thousand Beings Eternal Dao are also in the Dacheng realm.

Moreover, with the entrance of the Gray Mist Eternal Dao, Ye Tian will no longer be disturbed by the Gray Mist Trick Bridge, and he can easily break through the Grey Mist Trick Bridge.

So, Ye Tian walked on the Gray Mist Bridge, and never returned to the entrance of the Gray Mist Bridge, but kept walking like this, and after a long time, he finally came to the end of the Gray Mist Bridge.

With one step, the Grey Mist Bridge vanished.

Wow!

One thing fell into Ye Tian's hands, and this was the reward for breaking through the Gray Mist Bridge.

This is a suit of armor.

"Eternal Arcana? No, it doesn't have the breath of the Eternal Arcana on it, but it has the aura of the Eternal Mist Path, this thing should be an Eternal Treasure that is comparable to the Eternal Arcana and fits the Eternal Mist Eternal Dao. "

Ye Tian immersed the power of the Gray Mist Eternal Dao into it and quickly refined it.

Wow!

The battle armor was worn on Ye Tian's body, and it was completely close to Ye Tian.

At this time, Ye Tian felt that his strength had greatly improved, and his defense had also increased many times.

What's more, his Eternal Path of Grey Mist has also been amplified.

"Grey Mist Armor!"

That's the name of the Warframe.

In terms of value, this thing is comparable to an eternal treasure, and for Ye Tian, it is much more precious than an ordinary eternal treasure.

"There is such a reward for crossing the Gray Mist Bridge, the reward is too rich!"

Ye Tian muttered.

No wonder the True Saintless Land attaches so much importance to the Gray Mist Stone Statue, and a Legendary Realm Lord has personally come to guard it, because the reward is indeed very rich, and for the Legendary Realm Lord, this is a great opportunity, as long as he crosses the Gray Mist Bridge, even if he only gets one reward, it is worth it.

It is conceivable that after coming out of the Gray Mist Stone Statue, the strength of the True Saintless Land can be improved a lot.

Ye Tian continued to shuttle and fly forward, and soon saw the figures of some legendary lords.

Among these people, there were a few Realm Realm Legendary Lords and a number of Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords, but they didn't see the half-step Legendary Realm Lord, obviously the Half-Step Legendary Realm Lord had already gone to the next level.

"'The Endless Lord Factory'"

"Endless Lord!"

"Endless Lord!"

When these legendary lords saw Ye Tian, they were immediately shocked.

Ye Tian's cultivation was only a Legendary Lord of the Consummation Realm, and it was shocking to them that he had broken through the Gray Mist Bridge so quickly.

Even some of the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords took a little time to pass through the Grey Mist Bridge, and now there are still some Realm Legendary Lords who still haven't crossed the Grey Mist Bridge

You must know that the (Dede Zhao) Realm Legendary Lords who can qualify for a place to come to the Gray Mist Stone Statue are not ordinary Realm Legendary Lords, they are all real top existences among the Realm Legendary Lords!

Of course, they weren't too shocked and entangled, and they still needed to get through here before they could move on

It's a river, a combination of gray mist, that flows through this area, and it can't be bypassed.

"Lords, what's going on here?"

Ye Tian asked.

At this time, a transcendent realm legendary lord said: "This is the long river of gray mist, you must fly over, and once you can't fly over, you will fall into the long river of gray mist, unlike the gray mist treacherous bridge, it is very dangerous here, once you fall into the long river of gray mist, even the legendary lord of the realm has to pay a lot of price to break free." Therefore, every attempt has to pay a great price. "

Because of this, these legendary lords did not dare to try indiscriminately. _
